name: Oliver
description: Oliver is a sweet, energetic Golden Retriever mix who loves playing fetch and running in the yard. He is incredibly friendly, house-trained, and gets along well with children and other pets.
healthInfo: Fully vaccinated, neutered, and microchipped. Up-to-date on heartworm preventative.
story: Oliver was found wandering near a suburban park. Despite searching for his owners, no one claimed him. He has adapted wonderfully to shelter life but is eager to find a forever home where he can run and play to his heart's content.

name: Bella
description: Bella is an affectionate, curious Beagle mix. She has a high energy level and loves tracking scents in the garden. She is a quick learner and very motivated by treats.
healthInfo: Fully vaccinated, spayed, microchipped. Currently recovering from minor skin allergies, which are fully managed with a special diet.
story: Bella was rescued from a busy highway intersection, terrified and underweight. Our rescue team brought her in, nurtured her back to health, and she has blossomed into a joyful, trusting companion.

name: Rocky
description: Rocky is a dignified senior German Shepherd. He is incredibly calm, loyal, house-trained, and walks perfectly on a leash. He prefers quiet afternoons and a soft bed to nap on.
healthInfo: Fully vaccinated, neutered, microchipped. Has mild age-related hip arthritis, managed with daily joint supplements.
story: Rocky's previous owner had to move into an assisted living facility and could not bring him along. Rocky was heartbroken but has shown immense resilience. He is looking for a peaceful home to spend his golden years.

name: Luna
description: Luna is a bubbly, happy-go-lucky Labrador mix. She is extremely social, loves swimming, and is always ready for a walk. She would make an excellent companion for an active family.
healthInfo: Fully vaccinated, spayed, microchipped. Healthy with no known medical issues.
story: Luna was surrendered to the shelter when her family had to relocate overseas. She is very socialized and loves human attention, making her a perfect fit for a family that enjoys outdoor activities.

name: Daisy
description: Daisy is a quiet, gentle terrier mix. She can be a bit shy at first but once she warms up, she is a loyal lapdog who loves cuddles. She prefers a quiet household without too much activity.
healthInfo: Fully vaccinated, spayed, microchipped. Recently completed dental cleaning.
story: Daisy was rescued from an overcrowded shelter in another state. She was very timid upon arrival but has gained confidence through patience and positive reinforcement from our volunteers.

name: Coco
description: Coco is a charming Spaniel mix with a silky coat and expressive eyes. He gets along exceptionally well with other dogs and is very gentle.
story: Coco was rescued as a stray puppy in a rural area. He was successfully adopted by a loving family last year and now enjoys hiking and playing in his large backyard.
